title: The Cliff: Where Luxury Meets the Ocean
location_text: A Lifestyle Beyond CompareWelcome toThe Cliff—an exclusive residential haven designed for those who seek the perfect harmony between luxury and nature. Located just3 minutes from world-class surf breaksin the heart ofSurf City, El Salvador, this development offers a rare blend of serenity, sophistication, andunmatched investment potential.Know moreSurf City isn’t just a destination—it’s thefuture of coastal living. With booming infrastructure, premium amenities, and skyrocketing property values, this is your chance to own a piece of paradise where every sunset feels like a masterpiece.Why The Cliff?Expansive Lots(800–1,200 sq. yards) – Generous spaces designed for privacy and panoramic ocean views.Smart, Nature-Inspired Design– Every lot is positioned to maximize breathtaking vistas and natural light.Green Living– Conservation areas and lush landscapes for a lifestyle in tune with the environment.Cutting-Edge Technology– High-speed fiber optics and 24/7 security monitored from your smartphone.Legal Security & Condominium Regime– Fully permitted, with structured governance for shared harmony.Gated & Secure– Controlled access ensuring peace of mind for you and your family.Surf City: The Rise of a Premier DestinationMore than just a surf paradise, Surf City is El Salvador’s fastest-growing coastal hub, featuring:Modern infrastructureShopping centers, medical services, and bankingWorld-class gyms and wellness spacesAccelerated real estate appreciationInvesting here means securing a lifestyle of exclusivity, profitability, and natural beauty—all while being part of a thriving community.Your Oceanfront Legacy AwaitsSpaces at The Cliff are limited—don’t miss this opportunity to own in one of Central America’s most sought-after developments.Contact us today to schedule a private tour or request more details!Live where the waves meet wonder.Payment methodsOwnership Made Simple1️⃣Reserve Your Lot– Start with a $5,000 deposit (deductible from your total investment).2️⃣10% Down Payment– Due within 15 days of reservation.3️⃣Flexible Payment Plan– Structured installments over 18 months (5% at 6, 12, and 18 months).4️⃣Final Payment– Remaining 75% upon signing the deed.Total Investment: 25% upfront, 75% at closingProperty SizeContact us for more information on pricing and lot sizes.Listing updated: May 30, 2025Total Views: 1.982Relacionado
